name: Bexte and Zesch Generated Short-answer Relabeling Extract
population_or_context: Supervised content scoring for short-answer student responses using the Student Response Analysis dataset.
sample_size: For each of five labels, 100 answers were generated; experiments compare SRA-gen synthetic answers with original student-authored SRA answers.
methods: Extracted generated target-label design, label-conformance analysis, model training on generated labels, zero-shot LLM scoring baseline, and manual relabeling of generated answers.
education_context: Short-answer content scoring with a five-label SRA label scale.
response_origin: LLM-generated short answers are created in parallel to a student-authored SRA dataset and used as training data for content scoring models.
label_source: Initial labels are generated target labels requested in the prompt; the paper manually relabels generated answers to clean noisy labels.
generation_model: DeepSeek-v2, a 4-bit quantized mixture-of-experts model with 15.7B parameters, accessed through Ollama 0.5.7.
generation_method: Zero-shot answer generation requests 100 answers per desired label for each dataset question.
prompt_strategy: The prompt includes the question and a description of the desired label; default model parameters are used.
evaluation_method: Synthetic-label fidelity is examined through label-conformance analysis; scoring models trained on generated data are evaluated with macro-averaged F1 on original student answers.
scorer_use: Training-data generation and cold-start support for supervised content scoring.
real_response_comparator: Original SRA student-authored answers provide the test set and comparison point for models trained on generated answers.
reported_metrics: Macro-averaged F1, label-conformance analysis, and comparisons between as-generated labels, manually cleaned labels, and original SRA training data.
limitations: Generated answers are not automatically reliable just because the prompt asks for a target label.
Manual relabeling is required for competitive performance in the study.
The evidence is bounded to SRA short-answer content scoring and DeepSeek-v2 generation under the tested prompt.
